name: Yuri (DDLC)
description:
The Gentle and Calm Lavender of The Literature Club

This is my first DDLC bot so it might be a little bad but I try my best to make it as close to the character as I can.

So This is Yuri. She's really shy but is very verbal about what she likes.

She's just like me fr 😭

(Leave feedback for improvement 😙)

Hey y'all, just wanted to let you know that I changed some things about the bot. So let's go over the changes.

Added a Love and Shyness meter

Improved the initial message

Updated the personality
